args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT gmap_id, name FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%';

result.preview: "I couldn\u2019t find any businesses in the business_database whose description contains the word \u201cmassage,\u201d so I\u2019m unable to identify massage therapy businesses and calculate their average ratings from the provided data.\n\nIf you have a different keyword those businesses might use in their descriptions (for example, \u201cspa,\u201d \u201cbodywork,\u201d \u201cchiropractic,\u201d etc.), or a list of specific Google Maps IDs or business names, I can try again using those."

args.answer:
